cp-006: URL fetch failures render inline red text per-source instead of a global wizard
cp-007: Step-0 imported-reference summary shows Clear re-import only after references ex

cp-010: Deep Research source exposes a numeric input only while that source is selected

cp-012: Step 1 template grid includes a No Template Custom card in addition to academic
cp-013: Selecting No Template Custom clears templateId without changing audience type
cp-014: Selecting a template forces audienceType to the templates configured audience ty
cp-015: Template cards show default slide count and optional estimated duration in their
cp-016: Step-1 audience choices are rendered as pill buttons rather than cards
cp-017: Step-1 Next is always enabled and does not require a template selection

cp-019: Step 2 heading text is Configure Presentation

cp-024: Range slider minimum is 5 and maximum is 30

cp-030: Expanded structure preview shows slot title optional marker one-line guidance an
cp-031: Additional instructions textarea is optional and uses exactly three rows
cp-032: Empty additional instructions are sent to the generate API as undefined
